ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-15-2024 Continued To Nov-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 19, 2022 is admitted to probate. Tony Lee and Darlene Lee are appointed as the Co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 25, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
